title: Implement Phase 3: ferrum-strings, ferrum-ma, ferrum-stride-tricks, ferrum-numpy-interop

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Phase 3 coordinator plan: Launch 4 parallel agents for strings, ma, stride-tricks, numpy-interop. All simpler than Phase 2 crates. Python dev headers installed (Python 3.13, numpy 2.3.5, pyarrow 23.0.1, polars 1.38.1). ferrum-numpy-interop uses feature flags (python, arrow) — will need polars added to Cargo.toml.

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content:
PHASE 3 GATE PASSED:
- cargo build --workspace: SUCCESS
- cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings: SUCCESS (zero warnings)
- cargo test --workspace: SUCCESS — 1260 tests passed, 0 failed

Phase 3 new tests:
  ferrum-strings: 77 tests
  ferrum-ma: 41 tests
  ferrum-stride-tricks: 49 unit + 7 doctests = 56 tests
  ferrum-numpy-interop: 0 (default features) + 19 arrow + 21 polars = 40 with features

All 15 workspace crates compile and pass.

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Phases 1-3 complete (1260 tests, all passing). Handoff document written to continue.md. Phase 4 (f16, no_std, const generics) and Phase 5 (verification) remain. Dev branch needs Phase 3 merge. All crosslink issues from Phases 1-3 should be batch-closed.
